scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @jaa/api" "npm run dev -w @jaa/ui"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,ui,runner -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w @jaa/api" "npm run dev -w @jaa/ui" "npm run dev -w @jaa/browser-runner"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:packages && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
